pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — V51.1 stable. 69 WINs, 94.5% claimed. No new commits since last poll (2026-04-08T17:30Z). Standing watch: August 12 2026 eclipse prediction, WIN-068/069 coverage status, accuracy drop 95.2%→94.5%.

internal_issues.description: WIN-067 WGS84 fingerprint: dome gravity formula g(r) = 9.7803×(1+0.005307×exp(-r/8619)) is entirely WGS84-derived. Source field says 'WGS84 standard'. Monitor evaluates at r=0 where dome exponential vanishes (tautology). Two contradictory gravity models documented.
Malformed nested <a> tag in WIN-063 detail_evidence — ISS-646 fix introduced an outer anchor wrapping Olson & Deguen incorrectly. Fixed by removing the erroneous outer anchor.
WIN-063 '1.4x' example replaced with 'X%' variable to avoid attack surface. Curmudgeon Cycle 2 recommendation.
VERDICT CATEGORY OVERLOAD: 'Misleading' verdict conflates distinct failure modes. Pending human editorial decision.

digest_note: Curmudgeon digest shows 64 under-covered processed reviews with 276 missing issues. This count is inflated: the digest compares against open-issues.json only, not closed-issues.json. Most 'missing' holes were addressed in Cycle 1 and closed (544 total closed issues). The true unaddressed hole count is much smaller. WIN-063.c2.json is now committed with 2 previously-open holes patched this run.
